problem id: 7eaadb01
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00010001 -> 00111011
  11101010 -> 01010111
  00111011 -> 10010011
  01101000 -> 01011111
  10010111 -> 00100101
  00101010 -> 01010111
  01000001 -> 01111010
  11011101 -> 00001110
  01110000 -> 00111111

query: 01110110
predicted answer: 00100111
